---
title: "RNN"
author: "Alex Marcek"
output: html_document
---

## Data Import

```{r}
clickstream <- read.csv(here("Data", "EditedData", "clickstream_dc.csv"))

str(clickstream)
```

## Encoding

## RNN Fit

## RNN Performance

## Exension of Study

## Future Study : Interpretability vs Performance
